{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603241213128F3E90BCC8D1DE6BF0F0\"}"},"total":459},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7473101897141093145","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是一部难得一见的好作品，作者文笔流畅。一定是有足够丰富的阅历，才能写出如此完美的作品。将职场写的惟妙惟肖，主人公王浩的人物形象刻画地十分鲜明。作者写作态度十分认真，此作品肯定会大火。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739972410,"group_id":"7441053801269693502","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5wRAMATPtD6vhWhQQ+aiZXndC9ZCjs7TXm5c+kFevDx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3147241088100243","user_name":"梨花带雨的颜岚亭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3147241088100243","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441053801269693502","book_info":{"abstract":"作品以90后王浩为主人公，小官迷如愿成为一方大员，他语言风趣幽默，知识丰富，虽然仕途三起三落，但在百姓的拥护下、女友的助力下，最后如愿“玩到”厅级，看透官场，新的职务不去履新，却与家人们去旅行，最后成组建一个大家族。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obc94788a4cb6b520ffd892acfee30680~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"金施","author_id":"","book_id":"7441053801269693502","book_name":"锋与凰","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4811人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dr
